heading: Corps of Engineers: assignment or transfer of officers to duties involving civil functions
label: 7213 Corps of Engineers: assignment or transfer of officers to duties involving civil functions
text: Officers of the Corps of Engineers may be assigned or transferred to and from duties involving the civil functions of the Corps of Engineers only with the approval of the Secretary of the Army.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)353310:506(c) (proviso).(proviso), .Aug. 7, 1947, ch. 512, § 502(c)61 Stat. 883The words “and reassignments” are omitted as surplusage.
